business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

positives: 24 years in business with 18 years under current management.
Written contracts with all subcontractors are in place, and indemnification is required from all contractors.
All 8 listed locations are sprinklered, and the building is reported as fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R.
24-hour doorperson or security is present on premises.
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring.
Occupancy is reported at 95%, short-term rentals are not permitted, and there have been no OSHA citations in the past 3 years.
System updates reported: plumbing 2015, HVAC 2018, electrical 2023.
concerns: EV charging stations are installed on the premises.
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities are present.
Prior insurance history reflects claims in 2024 and 2022.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history shows 1 claim in 2024 with CNA Financial, 0 claims in 2023 with Zurich Insurance Group, and 1 claim in 2022 with American International Group; no cancellations reported.
